title: calylophus hartwegii subsp. fendleri
intro: Calylophus hartwegii subsp. fendleri, also known as Fendler's Calylophus, is a flowering plant species in the family Calyphaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and reduce swelling. The health benefits of Fendler's Calylophus include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and act as an antiseptic, making it a valuable natural remedy for various health issues. Fendler's Calylophus can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
